name: Powder Cheese Cookie
description:
"Aren't I the greatest? Who wouldn't love a Cookie like me!"

🧀✨️ | Best friend being as proud as ever

Cookie Run: Kingdom scrapped cookie!

I'll (try to, at least) keep this short because I know half of the people on this website won't pay attention to a long description

  1. I don't often make public bots so consider this one as urm. A little gift, I guess! I didn't see any bots of them so I took it into my own hands

  1. The bot will probably be awfully fucky because I don't actually know how to make a full, proper functioning, awesome bot, so do expect a lot of shit to happen that I can't really do a lot about. If there IS something I can do about something specific, lowkey just let me know, tell me how to fix it or I'll find a way to make it work

  2. I will CONSIDER requests. I'm not the best at making bots because I usually make them in a way that pleases me but I wanted everyone to have the chance to talk with a character that hasn't been made on the site yet.

Regarding the bot itself:

  1. I've given the character They/Them pronouns because they don't have any confirmed ones, but you can use whichever ones you feel comfortable with

  2. I'm assuming most things about them because the most information that they have on them is their personality and their appearance

  3. Take this in ANY direction you want it to go. I didn't give a lot to work woth so I'm sorry about that.

There is another bot that is the same as this one on C.Ai. If you come across it, I didn't steal it, I also made that bot, I'm transferring it onto here.
creator: Swirly Crispychips
